title: Robot Speak: Talk to AI!

modules.title: Say Hello to Your AI Buddy
modules.sub: Meet your AI helper and see how it listens
modules.description: Learners are introduced to an AI character that keeps getting things hilariously wrong and start to wonder why. They explore what an AI helper actually is and try sending it their very first messages to see what happens.

modules.title: Why Did It Say That?
modules.sub: Discover why AI replies can be surprising or silly
modules.description: Learners look at funny AI mix-ups and play a guessing game to figure out why the AI responded the way it did. They begin to see that the words you choose change everything about the answer you get back.

modules.title: Ask Better, Get Better
modules.sub: Small word changes lead to much bigger improvements
modules.description: Learners experiment with the same question written different ways and compare the results side by side. They discover that being specific and clear helps the AI give answers that are actually useful.

modules.title: Give It a Job to Do
modules.sub: Tell the AI exactly what role you want it to play
modules.description: Learners practice writing prompts that assign the AI a clear job, like being a story helper or a quiz maker. They test out their job prompts and tweak the wording until the AI behaves just the way they imagined.

modules.title: When AI Gets Confused
modules.sub: Spot tricky prompts and learn how to fix them
modules.description: Learners tackle a set of broken or confusing prompts and act as prompt detectives to find what went wrong. They rewrite the prompts to be clearer and see how even small fixes can rescue a totally mixed-up reply.

modules.title: Send Your Best Prompt Ever
modules.sub: Craft, test, and share your greatest prompt creation
modules.description: Learners pull together everything they have learned to write one polished, purposeful prompt they are proud of. They reflect on what they tested and changed along the way, then share their best prompt and the story behind it.

synopsis: Something funny is going on â your AI helper keeps misunderstanding you, and only you can figure out the magic words to fix it. Through playful story puzzles, you'll discover how AI understands language and learn the art of writing prompts that actually work.
rationale: Children aged 8-10 are beginning to encounter AI assistants in school and at home with no understanding of how to communicate with them intentionally or critically evaluate their responses.
learning_outcome: Students can write a clear, purposeful prompt for an AI tool, explain why word choice matters, and share their best prompt along with what they learned from testing it.
nearest_existing: What Does AI Actually Do With Words?
